sections.label: Macro
sections.body: BTC sits flat at $73,554 while breadth surged from 9/20 to 16/20 green. XLM, HYPE, BNB, XMR absorbed demand as dominance slid 0.13 pp. Capital compression looks selective — BTC ETFs logged a third-largest-ever $1.4B weekly outflow while HYPE-specific demand drained $46M of spot supply in 48 hours. Three flow directions in one window, not a broad risk-off rotation.

sections.label: Perps
sections.body: Two fresh ACCUMULATION signals land on HYPE and BNB after a fully-neutral universe yesterday. HYPE rides perp-DEX momentum on taker buy 51% with OI +22% 7d and smart money L/S ticking up. BNB carries exchange flow on vol 1.18x average and OI +12% 7d inside a tight 8% range. Broader regime stays QUIET — 23 of 25 names neutral.

sections.label: Book
sections.body: Five-position set turns over today. XLM hits horizon at +39% on the DTCC settlement breakout — clean win. EIGEN closes at horizon barely red but matched BTC drawdown. ICP and SEI ride multi-week structural theses through the sector rotation. INJ catches the AI rotation early on day 2 at +9.5%.

market_sentiment.bias_line: Bias · Ride HYPE into US open through the ATH confirmation. The perp-DEX setup stacks deeper than anything else today — a16z whale, supply crunch, ACCUMULATION confirmed. Let BNB and LAB confirm a second day before adding.

current_positions.thesis_note: Horizon reached. EigenCloud/Nebius structural build held but AI-compute sector rotated out for the perp-DEX leg. Modest loss matched BTC.
MISSION70 supply deflation is a 28-month structural thesis, multi-week horizon. Sector rotation off compute does not break the thesis itself.
current_positions.watch: $2.65 stop sits 3% below — the deflation story has to carry on its own now that the AI-compute rotation cooled. A second straight day below $2.70 with the AI cohort red puts the multi-week hold under structural pressure.

current_positions.thesis_note: June 15 EVM migration sits 16 days out. Price flat near entry, stop $0.062 well below — catalyst window still ahead.
current_positions.watch: Watching for any pre-migration delay leak that would crack the dated catalyst. Below $0.066 with no recovery wick marks the structural break.

current_positions.thesis_note: Horizon reached at +39% on the DTCC settlement breakout — vol 2.18x average, short liquidations confirmed the squeeze. Today's -5.97% pullback is the first cooling, profit-take before mean reversion.
Day 2/3 at +9.5%. INJ leads the AI rotation today on $312M vol, funding -0.04%/8h means shorts pay longs, top L/S 0.99 keeps squeeze fuel in place.
current_positions.watch: INJ holds the AI rotation lead but a sector flush drags it. Watch for AI-cohort red sessions or funding flipping strongly positive — both would mean late longs crowding while smart money exits.

thesis: Hyperliquid extended its all-time high to $66.35 today on ACCUMULATION confirmed — OI built 22% over the week with smart money L/S ticking up alongside price, funding negative at -0.014%/8h means shorts pay longs.
An a16z-linked whale bought $14.5M of HYPE this week as spot exchange outflows drained $46M of supply in 48 hours. Institutional capital arrives while the supply side compresses.
Perp-DEX narrative sits at full extension with Coinbase Institutional naming the category proven — $21.8B 24h DEX volume on $7.3B OI reads as structural growth, not a flash bid.
Capital compressing into HYPE specifically as BTC ETFs bleed $1.4B and USDT contracts $1.15B — three flow directions in 48 hours, one name absorbing the rotation.
risks: Crowded long positioning typical at ATH extension — top L/S 1.33 with smart money building means a sharp pullback drags retail and smart-money longs together.
Perp-DEX narrative sits at full extension. Days 7-14 of a peak narrative are consensus and late entries get punished if the regime turns.
We closed HYPE neutral four days ago on a fade-peak-fade whipsaw. Re-entering past the prior failed bounce risks the same chop pattern.

watchlist.trigger: second daily close holding ACCUMULATION with OI continuing to build, OR a clean break above $685 on volume above 1.5x the recent average
watchlist.invalidation: close below $645 before the trigger fires
thesis: BNB printed fresh ACCUMULATION today after a fully-neutral universe yesterday — OI built 12.45% in 24 hours on taker buy 52.11% and volume 1.18x average.
Smart money L/S 1.40 with -0.10 over 7 days reads as exchange-flow early positioning where retail has not joined yet. Range tight at 7.84% with funding still calm at +0.01%/8h.
ACCUMULATION on day 1 needs a second day's confirmation before committing. The pattern fires cleanly on continued OI build with the range holding under 25%.

watchlist.trigger: single hour of taker buy above 52% with the +9% 24h leg holding into the daily close
watchlist.invalidation: close below $6.00 before the trigger fires
thesis: LAB carries +62% 7d on day-3 of its breakout with funding -0.10%/8h — the deepest short-pay in the universe means shorts have lost patience, squeeze fuel stacked.
Top L/S 1.22 holds steady (+0.01 over 7 days) so no extreme crowding. OI +44% 7d shows fresh leverage entering the breakout, not late-stage exhaustion.
Taker buy 50.89% sits one percentage point under the 52% confirmation gate. A single hour above 52% with the leg holding promotes to long.

evaluations.note: Day 7/7. EIGEN absent from today's perps slice and token-movers — price near $0.223 from yesterday's snapshot. Horizon expires today, AI-compute sector rotation has fully cooled in favor of the perp-DEX/exchange-flow leg. Position matched BTC's drawdown (-3.0% vs BTC -4.5% over the window). CLOSE on horizon at neutral.

Day 4/multi-week. ICP $2.72 from outcome-tracker stale price — absent from today's perps slice. MISSION70 supply deflation is structural (28-month horizon), not narrative-dependent. Multi-week thesis intact, $2.65 stop sits 3% below. RIDE on tight watch — a second close below $2.70 with AI cohort red marks the structural break.

Day 4/multi-week. SEI ~$0.0691 from outcome tracker, absent from today's perps slice. June 15 EVM migration sits 16 days out — catalyst window still ahead. Sitting flat near entry with the $0.062 stop 10% below. RIDE.

Day 3/3. XLM ~$0.2415 (token-movers spot) down -5.97% 24h after extending +71.9% 7d — first cooling session after a four-day breakout. Horizon expires today at +39% from entry. DTCC settlement narrative played exactly as positioned, vol 2.18x average, short liquidations confirmed the squeeze. CLOSE on horizon at WIN.

Day 2/3. INJ $6.558 up +10.8% 24h and +22.9% 7d — the AI rotation lead picked up clean follow-through. Vol/mcap heavy at 0.47, funding -0.04%/8h means shorts pay longs, top L/S 0.99 keeps squeeze fuel intact. Up +9.5% from entry, $5.20 stop 21% below. RIDE.

close.close_reason: Horizon reached day 7/7. EigenCloud/Nebius structural build held but the AI-compute sector that drove the original positioning rotated out for the perp-DEX/exchange-flow leg this week. Position matched BTC's drawdown exactly — closed neutral at horizon rather than ride into day 8 without sector support.

Horizon reached day 3/3 at +39% from entry. The DTCC settlement breakout played out clean — vol 2.18x average, short liquidations 53x the weekly average, top L/S flipped from net short into the move. Today's -5.97% pullback is the first cooling after a four-day extension. Profit-take at horizon before the rip mean-reverts further.

thesis: Hyperliquid extended its all-time high to $66.35 on ACCUMULATION confirmed — OI +22% 7d, smart money L/S ticking up, funding negative at -0.014%/8h means shorts pay longs.
An a16z-linked whale bought $14.5M this week as spot exchange outflows drained $46M of supply in 48 hours — institutional capital arriving while supply compresses.
Perp-DEX narrative at full extension — Coinbase Institutional names the category proven on $21.8B 24h DEX volume and $7.3B OI. Structural growth, not flash speculation.
Capital compressing into HYPE specifically as BTC ETFs bleed $1.4B and USDT contracts $1.15B. Three flow directions in 48 hours, one name absorbing the rotation.
named_risks: Top L/S 1.33 with smart money building means a sharp pullback drags both retail and smart-money longs.
Perp-DEX narrative at full extension — days 7-14 are consensus, late entries get punished.
Re-entering past the prior failed bounce risks the fade-peak-fade chop pattern that closed HYPE neutral four days ago.

engine_watch_conditions.trigger_label: funding flipped strongly positive — late longs crowding the move
smart money crowded long — distribution risk building
open interest unwinding — fast leverage flush

open_now.promotion_note: ATH breakout confirmed — daily close cleared the $64.27 trigger and extended to $66.35 today. ACCUMULATION CONFIRMED on perps with OI +22% 7d, a16z whale buy and exchange outflows stack the institutional thesis. Promoting to multi-week LONG.

add_watchlist.invalidation: close below $645 before the trigger fires

thesis: BNB printed fresh ACCUMULATION today on OI +12.45% 24h, taker buy 52.11%, vol 1.18x average — exchange flow leading after a neutral universe yesterday.
Smart money L/S 1.40 with -0.10 over 7 days reads as early positioning where retail hasn't joined yet. Range tight at 7.84% with funding calm at +0.01%/8h.
ACCUMULATION on day 1 needs a second day before committing. The pattern fires cleanly on continued OI build with the range holding.

thesis: LAB carries +62% 7d on day-3 of its breakout with funding at -0.10%/8h — the deepest short-pay in the universe, shorts have lost patience and squeeze fuel stacks.
Top L/S 1.22 holds steady with no extreme crowding. OI +44% 7d shows fresh leverage entering the breakout rather than late-stage exhaustion.

named_risks: Breakout names that fail to confirm volume typically unwind hard — invalidation tight at $6.00 to limit drawdown.

drop_watchlist.note: Privacy narrative reversed direction this week. Circle's $12.6M cUSDC freeze on Zama re-fired the privacy thesis with renewed interest specifically named for ZEC and XMR — the setup has flipped from short-the-fade to squeeze risk. ZEC at $521 already sits well below the original $560 trigger we never caught, and top L/S 0.82 means shorts are already crowded into the move. Dropping rather than carrying — the asymmetry is no longer there.
